Docs.summary: The parameters that describes a set of credentials that will be used when a run is invoked.

Docs.summary: Describes the credential parameters for accessing other custom registries. The key for the dictionary item will be the registry login server (myregistry.azurecr.io) and the value of the item will be the registry credentials for accessing the registry.
